bundle.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Ario Moniri. Based on RefChecker by Mark Russinovich (MIT).
bundle.longDescription: Desktop wrapper around RefChecker. Validates citations against Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, DBLP, and ACL Anthology, and uses LLM-powered search to detect likely fabricated references.

fileAssociations.name: PDF Document
